goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'museum' and should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'stevenage' and should leave on 'wednesday'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 08:15'.
Make sure you get 'departure time' and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of museum and should be in the centre
Make sure you get postcode and address
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from stevenage and should leave on wednesday
The train should go to cambridge and should arrive by 08:15
Make sure you get departure time and travel time
